ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiment_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment result */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Identifier linking to the specific experiment */,
  "attr" TEXT /* Attribute being estimated */,
  "theta" REAL /* Estimated value of the attribute */,
  "width_confint" TEXT /* Confidence interval for the estimated value */,
  "width_CI" REAL /* Width of the confidence interval */,
  "t_test" REAL /* t-test statistic for the estimated value */,
  "pvalue" REAL /* p-value for the t-test */,
  "time" REAL /* Time taken to compute the estimate */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used for estimation */,
  "rep" INTEGER /* Repetition number of the experiment */,
  "objective" REAL /* Objective value of the experiment */,
  "nrmse" REAL /* Normalized Root Mean Squared Error (NRMSE) */,
  "theta_true" REAL /* True value of the attribute */,
  "bias" REAL /* Bias in the estimation */,
  "fn" INTEGER /* Number of false negatives */,
  "fp" INTEGER /* Number of false positives */,
  "f_type" TEXT /* Type of function or attribute */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the result was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the result */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the user who recorded the result */,
  "experiment_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_results_method FOREIGN KEY ("method") REFERENCES methods ("method_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_results_attr FOREIGN KEY ("attr") REFERENCES attributes ("attr_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_results_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the method */,
  "algorithm_type" TEXT /* Type of algorithm (e.g., gradient-based, heuristic) */,
  "parameter_settings" TEXT /* JSON field to store method-specific parameters */,
  "source_code_link" TEXT /* Link to the source code of the method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attributes" (
  "attr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute */,
  "attr_name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the attribute */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit in which the attribute is measured */,
  "expected_range" TEXT /* Expected range of values for the attribute */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attr_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each experiment result
Identifier linking to the specific experiment
Confidence interval for the estimated value
t-test statistic for the estimated value
Time taken to compute the estimate
Timestamp of when the result was recorded
Timestamp of the last update to the result
Identifier of the user who recorded the result
Additional notes or observations about the experiment
JSON field to store method-specific parameters
Link to the source code of the method
Unit in which the attribute is measured
Expected range of values for the attribute
Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin)
Boolean to indicate if the user account is active
